understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to reach the goal gem tile (`+`) by moving horizontally and letting gravity pull the character to safe landing spots, while avoiding spike tiles that cause an instant loss.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal movement (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) initiates a gravity fall to the next solid tile or hazard. CLICK removes breakable blocks (x) at a specified position to clear paths downward. UNDO reverts the last action. Spikes (u/v) are lethal on contact. Moving platforms can impose turn limits. The episode likely ended because the goal gem was reached or the level was completed after clearing obstacles and navigating falls.
